lyric_text:
Some where o ver the rain bow way up high

There's a land that I heard of once in a lull a by

Some where ov er the rain bow skies are blue

And the dreams that you dare to dream re ally do come true

Some day I wish up on a star

And wake up where the clouds are far be hindme

Where trou bles smelled like lem on drops

a Way a bove the chim ney tops

That's where you'll find me

Some where o ver the rain bow blue birds fly

Birds fly o ver the rain bow

Why then oh why can't I
I


If hap py lit tle blue birds fly be yond the rain bow

Why oh why can't I飞跃灿烂的彩虹（直上）蓝天
那里有童话传说
（中的）仙境乐圆
飞越灿烂的彩虹蔚蓝天

醒来发现脚下白云片片
我忘掉人间烦恼痛苦
腾云驾雾遨游四海（快乐）似神仙
